chapter1_listen_to_changes.title: New Paths, Familiar Land
chapter1_listen_to_changes.narrative_goal: Listen to how visitors, trade and new routes are beginning to affect daily life.
chapter1_listen_to_changes.historical_context: European explorers, missionaries and railway construction entered Kenyan communities at different times and in different ways. This prototype introduces change through local observation rather than treating it as inevitable progress.
chapter1_listen_to_changes.journal_entry: Chapter 1 - First Encounters: Newcomers and new routes could bring unfamiliar goods, beliefs and demands. Communities interpreted and responded to these changes from their own perspectives.
